abilities.name: Elusive
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

abilities.name: Sinister Whisper
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone) and choose a Shadow Door within 6" of itself. If it does so, enemy models within (aura)1" of the chosen marker gain an Entranced token.

actions.name: Shade Bet
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an Entranced token, this action receives a (+).
actions.effects: This model may look at the top card of the target's fate deck and may choose to discard it.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Watch the Hand
triggers.text: Immediately, increase this action's duel total by +2.

actions.name: Keeping Tabs
actions.effects: Randomly reveal three cards from the target's hand. For each raise this action receives, discard one of the revealed cards.

triggers.name: Lingering Shadow
triggers.text: Make a Shadow Door marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Fall into Darkness
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with a Shadow Door marker within 6".

actions.name: Shadow Stride
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Remove a Scheme or Shadow Door marker within range.
actions.effects: This model moves up to 6", ignoring models.
